name: Close
tagline: CRM built for inside sales teams that call and email
description: Close is a sales CRM designed specifically for inside sales teams who rely on phone and email outreach. It has built-in calling, SMS, email sequences, and power dialler — no integrations required.
pros: Best built-in calling of any CRM
use_cases: Your inside sales team makes high call volumes daily and needs a built-in dialler with call recordings — no Aircall integration required
You want email sequences, SMS, and VoIP calling managed from a single CRM without bolting tools together
Your reps use Smart Views to filter leads by last contacted date, deal stage, or custom criteria and need instant pipeline visibility
You're a small or mid-size sales team that wants fast onboarding and a clean UI without Salesforce's configuration overhead
